没点精神病，谁写小说啊
自从外卖员杨二狗24岁第一次遇鬼之后，便逐渐开始放飞自我。
面对鬼
“大哥，你看你打也打了，揍也揍了，手机也找到了，就放了我呗。”
杨二狗低头看了眼手机：“少废话，帮我把这单外卖送了去。”
面对老仙
“彪弟马，你竟敢给我缝裤衩子，看我不抽死你。”
杨二狗：“谁让你总用屁崩我，大招我都给你破了，看你还咋跟我装犊子，来，今天谁服谁孙子。”
面对人
“二狗，快，找个东西封住他后穴，不然他神魂就要散了……靠！你手里拿的是什么……你个彪子，你把他皮燕子给粘死了……”
面对神
“奶奶的，还敢拿雷劈我，看我今天不崩死你。”
下一秒，杨二狗点燃巴雷子，朝着城隍庙就扔了进去。
紧接着就听两声巨响，小小的城隍庙口，冒起了滚滚黑烟……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9391049de8041446194b556057a20f15","author":"米宇","author_id":"","book_id":"7366878507567172670","book_name":"杨二狗的爆笑出马历程","book_short_name":"爆笑出马纪实","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7366878741298938430","read_count":"33569","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000262"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"470","tags":"悬疑灵异,外卖,灵异,搞笑轻松,悬疑,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7a37d250c63410811fd9bc6d11846e60~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388821&x-signature=7hBuCeN%2BwR%2FqWdeL2ggxr3FmDwA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"63617934209","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"631"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230240217C4FE5FB969F87805AE1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwar
